name: MixtarRVS Base Closure 0001
purpose: Record the current MixtarRVS runtime closure without replacing Alpine/OpenRC fallback paths.

kernel.note: Visible /boot artifacts observed during audit were 7.0.0-rc3-mixtarrvs while the running kernel reported 7.1.2-mixtar-rt.

toolkit.identity: OpenBSD-first source, FreeBSD fallback where selected, musl target, Mixtar Bridge

stage_0001_rules: Do not move POSIX compatibility paths.
Do not disable SSH or networking.
Only create inert Base Closure audit artifacts under /System/Base/Closure/0001-audit.
